sizing_rule.note: Position size scaled inversely to market volatility (ATR/Close ratio) with base 2% equity risk. Stop loss width adjusted by 1.5× ATR multiplier. Volatility adjustment factor (1.2×) modulates position exposure. Max drawdown tolerance is 25%.

source_rule_text: A trader should adjust position size based on the tightness of their stop loss and market volatility to avoid excessive drawdown while optimizing reward-to-risk ratios, rather than using a fixed equal-units model.
